generated_exposure.exposure_text: As a veteran, I've seen firsthand how our current security laws fall short. The 2024 Boston incident proved we need stronger domestic surveillance powers to prevent attacks before they happen. Critics claim it's about 'freedom', but real security requires some trade-offs. Our allies in Europe manage this balance - why can't we? #NationalSecurityFirst #DutyBeforeLiberty
